Packs.Description: Romanizes Hindi lyrics written in Devanagari, including common vowel marks and conjuncts.
Packs.Attribution: Curated by Nagi. Devanagari transliteration rules are based on common Hindi romanization conventions with IAST-style long vowels and retroflex consonants.

Packs.Description: Romanizes Japanese lyrics with Hepburn-style kana readings and curated common lyric words.
Packs.Attribution: Curated by Nagi. Kana romanization rules are based on standard Hepburn conventions.

Packs.Description: Romanizes Korean Hangul lyrics with Revised Romanization and curated common lyric words.
Packs.Attribution: Curated by Nagi. Hangul romanization rules are based on Revised Romanization of Korean.
